creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed

This PR seems now to be largely addressed.  We now prevent multicast/ 
broadcast from going to specifically unicast IP protocols (TCP), and 
have better support for strong ES model stuff.  We still don't have 
things where we can twiddle strong/weak ES using a sysctl, but the 
person who volunteered to do that seems to have gone away.  Closing 
this PR since it seems to be effectively resolved.
